certainty: Greco's preferred reading is printed as "AB 3̣9̣-58 A 3̣0̣1̣+A 3̣0̣3̣": under-dots (uncertain reading) beneath BOTH digits of 39 (= PI wholly dotted/uncertain) and beneath ALL digits of the ligature signs 301 and 303; 58 (= SU) is printed WITHOUT dots and is the only sign Del Freo concedes ("sauf le second à gauche, qui pourrait être un AB 58"). The printed alternative "AB 2̣1f̣ +A 3̣0̣3̣" is likewise fully under-dotted (dots extracted under the 2 and the superscript f, and under 303). Godart's alternative "AB 21f 20 (ou 30)" is printed with no dots. No brackets printed. Del Freo's own doubts: when the trace is clear AB 39 is always closed at the bottom, and its upper horizontal is always crossed by the central vertical; the ligatures A 301+A 303 and AB 21f+A 303 are attested nowhere else ("suscite la perplexité").
source: Del Freo, Rapport 2016-2021, KO-RO-NO-WE-SA (Ariadne Suppl. 5), p. 104 (sha 40486242...); primary: Greco, A. 2022, Un frammento iscritto in lineare A da Festòs, Pasiphae 16, 153-166
notes: Vase fragment, signs incised after firing, found 2017 in a stratigraphic sounding of the Italian mission at Chalara (Phaistos), in an archaic-period pit containing the ritual deposition of an ovicaprid; ceramological analysis suggests LM III but Greco dates the fragment to the neopalatial phase on account of the inscription. The rapport prints NO GORILA-style designation for this piece (id here is a local slug). 'words' records only the syllabic sequence of Greco's preferred reading, AB 39-58 = PI-SU (PI heavily doubted, see certainty). Kept OUT of words: the ligature A 3̣0̣1̣+A 3̣0̣3̣ (*301+*303, logogram-like unit, unattested elsewhere), its alternative AB 2̣1f̣+A 3̣0̣3̣ (*21F+*303, also unattested), and Godart's competing reading AB 21f 20 (ou 30) = logogram *21F (OVIS f) + numeral 20 (or 30), under which the sherd would be an economic annotation (20 or 30 sheep) and an ostracon. Del Freo finds the theoretical alternatives to AB 39 (a 'squared' simplified AB 22 or a 'vertical' AB 81) "pas particulièrement attractives". Signs described as "formes idiosyncratiques difficiles à interpréter".
